newsFeed.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 with Autonomous Agent Capabilities
newsFeed.summary: GPT-5 can now autonomously complete multi-step work tasks, significantly increasing AI's ability to replace routine knowledge work.

newsFeed.title: EU Passes AI Workplace Protection Act Requiring Human Oversight
newsFeed.summary: New EU regulation mandates human oversight for AI systems used in hiring and workplace decisions, slowing automated replacement.

newsFeed.title: Google Automates 40% of Internal Code Review with AI
newsFeed.summary: Google reports that AI now handles 40% of code reviews internally, reducing the need for junior developer roles in QA.

newsFeed.title: Stanford Study: AI Creates 1.2 Jobs for Every Job It Displaces
newsFeed.summary: New research suggests AI is creating new job categories faster than it eliminates existing ones, particularly in AI oversight roles.

newsFeed.title: Amazon Replaces 2,000 Customer Service Roles with AI Chatbots
newsFeed.summary: Amazon transitions customer service operations to AI, affecting 2,000 positions across North American fulfillment centers.

newsFeed.title: Anthropic's Claude Passes Bar Exam with Top 1% Score
newsFeed.summary: Claude achieves a top 1% score on the bar examination, raising questions about the future of legal research and junior associate roles.
